hero.headline: Sell More. Spend Smarter. Scale Faster.
hero.subheadline: End-to-end e-commerce growth — from traffic acquisition to cart abandonment recovery and post-purchase retention.

body: E-commerce success is not just about driving traffic. It's about attracting the right buyers, converting them efficiently, and keeping them coming back. We own all three stages.
We combine paid acquisition with conversion rate optimisation, email/SMS lifecycle flows, and retention programs to maximise revenue per visitor.
Whether you're on Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, or a custom stack, our team builds growth systems that compound over time.

approach.title: Store & Funnel Audit
approach.description: We map your full customer journey — from ad click to checkout — and score every step for friction.

approach.title: Traffic Architecture
approach.description: Design a paid and organic traffic mix that balances acquisition cost with conversion quality.

approach.title: Feed & Catalogue Optimisation
approach.description: Clean your product feed, write conversion-focused titles, and group SKUs for smart bidding.

approach.title: Lifecycle Email & SMS Setup
approach.description: Build abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back, and VIP flows using Klaviyo or existing ESP.

approach.title: Conversion Rate Optimisation
approach.description: A/B test product pages, checkout flow, and offer structures to increase revenue per visitor.

approach.title: Retention & LTV Programme
approach.description: Loyalty mechanics, repeat purchase incentives, and VIP tiers to build a self-sustaining customer base.

features.title: Google Shopping Campaigns
features.description: Product listing ads and Performance Max campaigns structured for profit, not just revenue.

features.title: Meta Dynamic Product Ads
features.description: Automated ads that show each user exactly the products they viewed or are most likely to buy.

features.title: Email & SMS Lifecycle
features.description: Abandoned cart, welcome series, and repeat purchase flows built for e-commerce revenue.

features.title: Product Feed Management
features.description: Optimised feeds for Google Merchant Center, Meta Catalogue, and marketplace channels.

features.title: Marketplace Ads
features.description: Sponsored product and brand campaigns on the marketplaces where your buyers are already shopping.

features.title: Offer & Promotion Strategy
features.description: Data-driven promotion planning that drives sales without training buyers to wait for discounts.

hero.title: Compounding revenue growth
hero.description: Every optimisation we make stacks on the last. Your store gets more efficient month over month.

list.title: Single source of truth
list.description: Unified reporting across all channels in one dashboard — no more spreadsheet chaos.

list.title: Repeat buyer acceleration
list.description: Lifecycle programs that turn one-time buyers into loyal customers.

list.title: Margin-aware optimisation
list.description: We optimise for profit margin, not just revenue — ROAS targets set per product category.

list.title: Platform-agnostic
list.description: Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, custom — our systems work across all stacks.

caseStudies.label: Peak ROAS
caseStudies.context: Google Shopping for a fashion brand

caseStudies.label: Cart Recovery
caseStudies.context: Email and SMS abandoned cart flow

cta.headline: Your Store Has More Revenue Hidden in It
cta.supporting: We'll find it. Book a free e-commerce growth audit today.
